views.name: page_protected
views.definition:
SELECT name,
    parent,
    protected
   FROM users.page
  WHERE (selectable = false);

views.name: page_unprotected
views.definition:
SELECT name,
    parent,
    protected
   FROM users.page
  WHERE (selectable = true);

create_or_update_preference
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION users.create_or_update_preference(json_data json)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN

    -- check preference exists for user
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM preference WHERE user_struct_id = (json_data ->> 'user_struct_id')::bigint) THEN

        -- if not exists -> create
        PERFORM new_preference(json_data);
    ELSE

        -- else update it
        PERFORM update_preference(json_data);
    end if;

END;
$function$

functions.name: create_user_if_not_exists
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION users.create_user_if_not_exists(_email character varying)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN

    -- create if not exist
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM "user" WHERE email = _email) THEN

        INSERT INTO "user" (email) VALUES (_email);
    end if;
END;
$function$

functions.name: delete_page
delete_resource_access
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION users.delete_resource_access(_resource character varying, _access_type character varying)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN

    -- check if exist
    IF NOT EXISTS (
        (
            SELECT resource, access_type
            FROM resource_access
            WHERE resource = _resource
            AND access_type = _access_type
        )
        UNION
        (
            SELECT resource, access_type
            FROM customer_group_resources
            WHERE resource = _resource AND access_type = _access_type
        )
    ) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'No resource_access with (resource, access_type) = (%,%) found', _resource, _access_type USING ERRCODE = 'T1AZ0';
    end if;

    -- delete resource_access
    DELETE FROM resource_access WHERE resource = _resource AND access_type = _access_type;

    -- delete customer_group_resources
    DELETE FROM customer_group_resources WHERE resource = _resource AND access_type = _access_type;

END;
$function$

get_all_entailed_pages
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION users.get_all_entailed_pages()
 RETURNS TABLE(parent character varying, child character varying)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
begin
    RETURN QUERY SELECT page.name as parent, f.child
                 FROM page
                          LEFT JOIN get_entailed_pages(page.name) f ON page.name = f.parent;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION users.get_all_roles_by_customer_id(_customer_id bigint)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    roles json[];
BEGIN

    -- get all roles
    SELECT array(
        SELECT build_role(id)
        FROM role
        WHERE customer_id = _customer_id
    ) into roles;

    -- delete page
    RETURN to_json(roles);
END;
$function$

get_entailed_pages
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION users.get_entailed_pages(input_name character varying)
 RETURNS TABLE(parent character varying, child character varying, protected boolean)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY WITH RECURSIVE children_cte AS (
        SELECT page.name, page.parent, page.protected
        FROM page
        WHERE page.parent = input_name
        UNION ALL
        SELECT p.name, p.parent, p.protected
        FROM page p
                 INNER JOIN children_cte c ON p.parent = c.name
    )
                 SELECT input_name as parent, children_cte.name, children_cte.protected as child FROM children_cte;
END;
$function$

get_maintenance_email_for_customer
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION users.get_maintenance_email_for_customer(_customer_id bigint)
 RETURNS TABLE(email character varying, first_name character varying, last_name character varying, customer_name character varying, language character varying)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN

RETURN QUERY (

    SELECT maintenance_email.email , maintenance_email.first_name, maintenance_email.last_name, c.name, maintenance_email.language
            FROM (SELECT u.email, us.first_name, us.last_name, us.customer_id, COALESCE(p.language, 'it') AS language
              FROM users."user" u
                       INNER JOIN users.user_struct us on us.primary_email = u.email
                       LEFT JOIN users.preference p on us.id = p.user_struct_id
              WHERE maintenance_on_primary_email = true
              UNION
              SELECT c.value as email, us.first_name, us.last_name, us.customer_id, COALESCE(p.language, 'it') AS language
              FROM users.contact c
                       INNER JOIN users.user_struct us on c.user_struct_id = us.id
                       LEFT JOIN users.preference p on us.id = p.user_struct_id
              WHERE c.type_id = (SELECT id FROM contact_type WHERE name = 'secondary_email')
                AND maintenance_notification = true) as maintenance_email
                 LEFT JOIN customers.customer c ON maintenance_email.customer_id = c.id
        WHERE maintenance_email.customer_id = _customer_id
       );

END;
$function$

get_pages_by_role
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION users.get_pages_by_role(_role_id bigint)
 RETURNS TABLE(name character varying, parent character varying, protected boolean, selectable boolean)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN

    -- check if role exists
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM role WHERE id = _role_id) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'No role with id %d found', _role_id USING ERRCODE = 'T3AZ0';
    end if;

    RETURN QUERY (
        SELECT p.*
        FROM role r
        LEFT JOIN role_page rp on r.id = rp.role_id
        LEFT JOIN page p on rp.page_name = p.name
        WHERE r.id = _role_id
    );
END;
$function$

functions.name: get_pages_by_user_struct
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION users.get_pages_by_user_struct(user_struct_id bigint)
 RETURNS TABLE(name character varying, parent character varying, protected boolean, selectable boolean)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN

    -- check if user_struct exists
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM user_struct WHERE id = user_struct_id) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'No user_struct with id %d found', user_struct_id USING ERRCODE = 'T5AZ0';
    end if;

    RETURN QUERY (
            SELECT p.*
            FROM user_struct us
            LEFT JOIN role r on us.role_id = r.id
            LEFT JOIN role_page rp on r.id = rp.role_id
            LEFT JOIN page p on rp.page_name = p.name
            WHERE us.id = user_struct_id AND us.enabled = true
    );
END;
$function$
